calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus Pursuant To California Civil Procedure Code 1094.5
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KENNETH M. SHEPPARD OF JONES/CLIFFORD, TEL. NO. 431-5310 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. REBECCA LIU, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3870 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MILAN KANGRGA'S Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus Pursuant To California Civil Procedure Code 1094.5 is Denied. The evidence supports the administrative decision. The Administrative Law Judge primarily relied on the findings of Dr. Allem in reaching his decision. The evidence establishes that Dr. Allem performed a comprehensive physical examination and thoroughly reviewing Petitioner's medical records. Dr. Allem reached the conclusion that "[Petitioner's] work as a police officer did not cause or contribute to his coronary artery disease on any biological basis. His CAD, its evolution and extent and need for treatment has been determined by the confluence of his multiple personal risk factors - age, sex, family history, smoking hypertension, obesity, hyperlipidemia, and sleep apnea. His risk of coronary artery disease was determined exclusively on these well recognized biological risk factors, and was not increased by the fact that he was a police officer." (AR 66.) Additionally, the Administrative Law Judge relied on the fact that Petitioner "was not compliant with the medications and lifestyle changes recommended to him by his physicians." (AR 14.) This fact is evidenced by Petitioner's medical records. (AR 93-95, 108-109, 116-122, 125-126, 166-170.) Thus, the evidence supports the Administrative Law Judge's conclusion that Respondent presented sufficient evidence to overcome the presumption provided for in San Francisco Administrative Code sec. 16.85. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913 =302/ehg
